title: State Transition with Guard Evaluation — Process Flow
content: flowchart TD

start([START: User requests transition from_state → to_state
POST /api/v1/actions/id/transitions
Body: to_state, comment])

s1[1. Load action with current state
Include workflow definition, compliance profile]

s2[2. Lookup transition in workflow definition
Find transition WHERE from_state=current
AND to_state=requested]

d1{Valid transition exists
in workflow definition?}

stop422a([END - 422 Unprocessable Entity
No valid transition])

s3[3. Load guard conditions for this transition
Guards sourced from workflow definition
+ compliance profile]

s4["4. Evaluate guards in deterministic order
all 9 evaluated, failures collected:
[1] Role check — actor has required role
[2] Transition required fields — NULL/empty fails
[3] Compliance required fields — NULL/empty fails
[4] HoC enforcement — min 20 chars for admin/PPE
[5] Consultation completion — all must be closed
[6] RCA validation — JSON vs compliance schema
[7] Sub-action dependencies — all in terminal state
[8] Verification separation — verifier ≠ work actor
[9] Evidence requirement — count ≥ profile minimum"]
d2{All guards pass?}

stop422b([END - 422 Unprocessable Entity
guard_failures: guard, reason, details])

s5[5. Update action state
UPDATE actions.actions
SET state=to_state, version=version+1]

s6[6. Record ActionStateHistory entry
INSERT actions.action_state_history
action_id, from_state, to_state,
changed_by, comment]

s7[7. Record ActionAuditEvent - state change
INSERT actions.action_audit_events
action_id, event_type='state.transitioned',
actor_id, details]

s8[8. Evaluate escalation rules for new state
Check if new state triggers escalation
tier resets or activations]
s9[9. Return 200 OK with updated action DTO + ETag]
stop([END])
start --> s1 --> s2 --> d1
d1 -->|No| stop422a
d2 -->|No| stop422b
